items.claim: Hussein's opponent can make mistakes in the grappling.
items.quote: He can make mistakes in the grappling.

items.claim: Hussein's opponent's chin is in question after getting knocked out by Long.
items.quote: The chin could be in question at this point after getting sparked by Long.

items.claim: Axel Sola has a ton of heart and no quit in him.
items.quote: Axel Solola has a ton of heart. He has no quitting them.

items.claim: Axel Sola went to absolute war with Mason Jones, got hurt, and battled through to the final bell.
items.quote: he went to absolute war with Mason Jones, got hurt, was able to fight through it, battle through it, you know, reach the final bell.

items.claim: Ismail Bonfim quits when facing adversity.
items.quote: Ismael Bonfim, if there's a lick of adversity in the entire fight, he's going to quit.

items.claim: Ismail Bonfim quit against Nazim Sadykhov due to a cheek cut.
items.quote: He quit against Nazim Satakov, you know, on a cut that was not even near his eye. It was on the the cheek. He just quit.

items.claim: Ismail Bonfim quit against Chris Padilla by pulling guard and covering up.
items.quote: He straight up quit against Chris Padilla. Pulled guard and and covered up.

items.claim: Axel Sola is going to be much bigger and much tougher than Ismail Bonfim.
items.quote: Axel Solo is going to be much much bigger, much tougher.

items.claim: All six of Ismail Bonfim's losses have come inside the distance.
items.quote: Bonfam has six losses. All six of them come inside the distance.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibio is 39 years old and approaching the washed category.
items.quote: Pontanibio who's 39 years old who is is just approaching the WA or he's he's been approached the washed category.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibio's chin is dust, having been dropped by Carlston Harris, Alex Morono, and knocked out by Kevin Holland.
items.quote: this guy's chin I think is dust. He's getting dropped by Carlson Harris. He's getting dropped by Alex Morono. He's getting you know knocked out by Kevin Holland.

items.claim: Sam Patterson has a ton of power.
items.quote: Sam Patterson who has a ton of power.
